label: Situation 1
situation: You are walking to college and see a child crying near a busy road with no guardian nearby.

situation: Your friend forgets his admit card on the day of an important exam.

situation: You notice an elderly man struggling to carry heavy bags at a railway station.

situation: A teammate is repeatedly coming late for practice and team morale is dropping.

situation: Your bike breaks down on a deserted road while returning late at night.

situation: Your group project is due tomorrow but one member has not completed his part.
